title: Velvety Argentinian Cheese Curds Toast
description: A weeknight Argentinian dish featuring cheese curds, toast, and fresh flavors, perfect for a quick and delicious meal. The combination of creamy cheese curds, crispy toast, and floral notes creates a velvety texture and taste experience.

ingredients.name: cheese curds
ingredients.notes: fresh, preferably from an Argentinian dairy

instructions: Arrange the baguette slices on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 5-7 minutes, or until crispy and lightly browned.
In a small bowl, mix together the chimichurri sauce, parsley, oregano, garlic, lemon juice, and olive oil.
In a separate bowl, toss the cheese curds with a pinch of salt and black pepper to taste.
To assemble the toast, place a toasted baguette slice on a plate, top with a spoonful of the cheese curds, and drizzle with the chimichurri sauce mixture.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a spoonful of the chimichurri sauce on top.
Garnish with additional parsley and oregano, if desired.
